====Befriended====
{{TrainerPoké
|nick=Pidove
|type1=Normal
|type2=Flying
|img=Pidove anime.png
|epnum=JN029
|epname=There's a New Kid in Town!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Pidove}} is a Pokémon belonging to a Trainer. It got lost during a Pidove race and was chased by a {{p|Fearow}}, which led to it crashing into Chloe's window and injuring its wing. The Cerise family took it in and helped it recover. During its recovery, it developed a friendship with Chloe. It was eventually reunited with its Trainer through an online message posted by [[Professor Cerise]].

None of Pidove's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|nick=Ponyta
|type1=Psychic
|img=Glimwood Tangle Ponyta.png
|epnum=JN055
|epname=The Tale of You and Glimwood Tangle!
|vajp=Fumiko Takekuma
|vaen=Fumiko Takekuma
|desc=Chloe encountered this {{rf|Galarian}} {{p|Ponyta}} in [[Glimwood Tangle]], where she found it trying to help an injured Galarian {{p|Rapidash}}. As Ponyta couldn't heal Rapidash alone, Chloe figured that they needed to find dew from a flower that had healing properties. With help from a trio of {{p|Impidimp}}, they were able to find the flower and heal Rapidash. Ponyta later gave [[Chloe's Eevee]] a lift to [[Ballonlea]], before riding off with Rapidash.

Ponyta reappeared in a flashback in ''[[JN082|The Sweet Taste of Battle!]]'', when [[Opal]] told Chloe that it and Rapidash were doing well.

Ponyta's only known move is {{m|Heal Pulse}}.}}
